title: Ryaac Cobbelmon
description: In my opinion this is the best modpack for 1.21.1 Cobbelmon
body:
This modpack is an optimized experince for Cobbelmon players.

This modpacks adds cobblemon and some addon for it
you should download this modpack for one of the best cobblemon experinces in 1.21.1
The cobbelmon version is 1.6

Resorcepacks
- better leaves
- cobblemon classic grass pack
- cobblemon interface
- cobblemon motion
